title: Valve announces Steam Machine price and SteamOS compatibility with AMD PCs
summary: The company confirms the launch of Steam Machine starting at $1,049 and allows installing SteamOS on computers with AMD GPUs so that users can create their own version.

title: EA conducts massive layoffs before its sale to Saudi Arabia
summary: The publisher reduces recruitment, support, and security staff as it prepares for its $55 billion sale.

title: Kojima details his new horror game OD, which only Xbox wanted to publish
summary: The Japanese director reveals aspects of the terrifying OD, whose concept was not understood by other publishers, and shares images that evoke his legendary demo P.T.

title: Tencent plans to withdraw investments in Japanese studios like Marvelous
summary: The Chinese giant retreats from Japan, which could destabilize studios like Marvelous, known for Monster Hunter Stories and Story of Seasons.

title: Capcom will hold a Spotlight event on June 25
summary: The showcase will feature news on Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen, Onimusha, and other important titles from the company's catalog.

title: Sea of Thieves will have a live-action film adaptation
summary: The film, directed by the Spider-Man filmmaker, is one of more than a dozen audiovisual projects that Xbox has in development.

title: Rhythm Heaven Groove launches its free demo on Nintendo Switch
summary: Players can now try the long-awaited Nintendo rhythm game with the 'Starter Demo' available on the eShop.

title: Nicolas Cage becomes a playable operator in Call of Duty
summary: The actor joins the Season 4 Reloaded of Black Ops 7, adding to a growing and eclectic cast of characters.

title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 generates deal guides and alternatives
summary: Websites analyze Prime Day discounts, offering shopping guides on Amazon and recommendations for those who prefer to avoid the platform.

title: EA executives defend that AI is driving creativity in their studios
summary: Electronic Arts senior management assures that artificial intelligence enables faster prototypes and a genuine creative boom in game development.

title: The concept of God of War Laufey was planned since 2018
summary: The actor of Laufey and Cory Barlog confirm that the character's story is not new, but has been in development for nearly a decade.

title: French union STJV calls a general strike in video games
summary: The video game workers' union in France calls for a national strike to denounce the crisis affecting the sector.

title: Obsidian Entertainment sued for alleged labor violations
summary: The studio responsible for Fallout: New Vegas faces a class action lawsuit for an alleged systematic pattern of wage abuse.

title: The Skitarii class arrives in Warhammer 40,000: Darktide, taking by storm
summary: The new class in Fatshark's game becomes a hit among players, who praise its design and power on the battlefields of the Tertium Hive.

title: The cooperative RPG Fellowship receives a huge update
summary: The game debuts a patch with more than 2,000 changes and players are already sharing guides for Season 3, which includes the character Gunde.

title: Kynseed, the life simulator from former Fable members, comes to consoles
summary: The game confirms its release on PlayStation, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch for August 4th.

title: SAND: Raiders of Sophie is now available after multiple delays
summary: The desert open-world extraction and survival game finally launches, and players can follow detailed guides for its systems.

title: The Last of Us 2 multiplayer mod for PC nears release
summary: The creators of the mod that adds multiplayer mode to the PC game aim for September for its final release.

title: Love and Deepspace adds a werewolf romantic interest named Valko
summary: The new addition to the mobile dating game sparks intense debate among fans about its appeal in different cultures.

title: Pokémon Pokopia celebrates the 'Wish Upon a Jirachi' event
summary: Trainers can now participate in the Jirachi event in Pokopia, with complete guides to complete all available challenges.
